---
title: "Assumption Map"
---

::: {.hero-panel}
These pages collect the assumptions that matter for the currently formalized
chapters. Each table separates the mathematical condition from the Lean names
and links to the proof endpoints that consume it.
:::

::: {.assumption-grid}
::: {.assumption-card}
### Chapter 2
Conditional expectation, CEF error, variance decomposition, and population
linear projection.

[Open Chapter 2](chapter2.qmd)
:::

::: {.assumption-card}
### Chapter 3
Finite-dimensional OLS algebra, projection matrices, and FWL.

[Open Chapter 3](chapter3.qmd)
:::

::: {.assumption-card}
### Chapter 4
Finite-sample regression assumptions, conditional mean zero, variance formulas,
Gauss-Markov, GLS, and White/HC covariance definitions.

[Open Chapter 4](chapter4.qmd)
:::

::: {.assumption-card}
### Chapter 5
Normal-regression and exact finite-sample distribution assumptions.

[Open Chapter 5](chapter5.qmd)
:::

::: {.assumption-card}
### Chapter 7
Asymptotic condition packages for consistency, CLTs, robust covariance, and
homoskedastic inference.

[Open Chapter 7](chapter7.qmd)
:::
:::
